title: Brief (machine-checkable extract)
description: JSON sidecar for units/<UID>/brief.md. Gates the PLUMBING of the executor contract (ids, deps, budget, criteria, tags, applied learnings, the socratic PROTOCOL REFERENCE) NOT the prose reasoning, which stays free-form in brief.md. Reason free-form, extract the residue downstream: validity != correctness. The ANSWERED socratic block lives in debrief+verify (the canonical 4-key block); the brief only carries a reference to the protocol. Adds tags (from V_tag) + learnings_applied for the learnings-propagation predicate.

socratic_protocol.description: REFERENCE to the Socratic protocol the executor MUST run before output (e.g. 'references/socratic-protocol.md'). The brief mandates the protocol; the ANSWERED 4-key socratic block is required in debrief.schema + verify.schema, never here (reason free-form, extract the residue downstream).

tags.description: This unit's tags, drawn from the enumerated vocabulary V_tag declared in graph.schema.json (`v_tag`). Membership (tags subset of V_tag) is enforced by validate_run.py. Basis for the tag-scoped learnings-propagation predicate.

learnings_applied.description: Ids of LEARNINGS entries applied in this unit. MAY be empty. The validator's propagation predicate REQUIRES that any tag-scoped learning E whose tag this unit carries (and created no later than this unit's wave) appears here.
